title: Another Slop Game
description:
Not good. Just fun. That’s the plan.Another Slop Game is a chaotic medieval platforming game about jumping across impossible ruins, dodging oversized weapons, falling into the abyss, and blaming your friends for everything.

Play solo or team up online with friends and try to survive a ridiculous obstacle course floating high above the water. Every jump matters, every mistake hurts, and every “easy” section somehow becomes a disaster.

This is not a heroic medieval adventure.

This is not a serious test of honor.

This is a stupid, painful, funny climb through a broken world full of traps, floating platforms, cannons, swinging axes, questionable physics, and very bad ideas.

[h2]Jump. Fall. Blame someone else.[/h2]

Cross floating stone platforms, unstable bridges, moving obstacles, giant weapons, cannons, spike traps, weird medieval machinery, and whatever else was clearly a mistake to build.

One wrong step can send you flying, falling, or dragging your entire team into chaos.

Play solo or with friends onlineTake on the course alone, or play online co-op with friends and turn a difficult climb into a complete social disaster.

Work together, rescue each other, argue over who jumped too early, and try not to ruin the run for everyone.

A medieval world that makes no senseClimb through floating ruins, broken castles, watchtowers, stone bridges, wooden traps, giant weapons, cannons, and strange objects suspended above a vast blue abyss.

It looks epic.

It plays stupid.

That is the point.

Features

• Chaotic medieval platforming

• Solo and online co-op gameplay

• Floating ruins, castles, towers, and impossible obstacle courses

• Giant swinging weapons, cannons, spike traps, moving platforms, and other hazards

• Checkpoint-based progression

• Timer for speedruns and painful comparisons

• Co-op rescue mechanics when things go horribly wrong

• A stupidly difficult climb designed to create funny moments

• No deep message. No noble destiny. Just slop.

Can you reach the end?Probably.

Will it be clean?

No.

Will someone fall?

Yes.

Will it be your fault?

Absolutely not.
description_short: Another Slop Game is a chaotic medieval co-op platformer where you and your friends jump, fall, scream, and suffer through floating ruins, giant traps, stupid obstacles, and terrible decisions. Play solo or online with friends. Reaching the top is optional, losing your mind is guaranteed.
